_meta.note: UNVERIFIED CONTACT DATA — do not treat as launch-ready. Every email below was transcribed from a Google AI Overview screenshot (retrieved 2026-07-16), which is a secondhand summary, not a primary source. The two primary sites (myescambia.com, cityofpensacola.com) returned HTTP 403 to automated fetches, so none of these have been confirmed against an official page. County-commission addresses are role-based (district{N}@myescambia.com) and structurally stable across elections; city-council addresses are person-based and change with every election. Before this data is used to email real officials, confirm all seven city-council addresses with the Pensacola City Clerk and re-check the full roster each election cycle (see per-entry verified:false flags). No map or API supplies contact info; verification is manual.

sources.county_commission_roster: Google AI Overview of 'escambia county commission email addresses' (cites MyEscambia.com), screenshot 2026-07-16
sources.city_council_roster: Google AI Overview of 'city of pensacola email addresses city council' (cites cityofpensacola.com City Council directory), screenshot 2026-07-16

county_commission.body: Escambia County Board of County Commissioners
county_commission.email_note: Role-based per-district addresses (district{N}@myescambia.com). Stable across elections; only the officeholder name changes.

city_council.email_note: Person-based addresses (firstinitial+lastname@cityofpensacola.com). Change with every election — MUST be re-confirmed with the City Clerk before public use.
